local_sources: Selected journal entries, FatturaPA ZIP or authorized connector export, and targeted supporting PDFs
local_processing: Remove known local-path fields, known absolute path occurrences, and private QA text from the browser payload served through the loopback workbench, and require a per-session token for write operations

codex_context.purpose: Resolve entry mappings and interpret unresolved evidence
codex_context.content: Selected entries, deterministic match results, invoice fields and targeted document excerpts
codex_context.minimum_necessary: Use only selected entries and evidence for unresolved checks; keep bulk invoice and journal populations local

residual_risks.risk: Selected entries, invoice fields and supporting excerpts may contain names, tax identifiers or transaction narratives
residual_risks.mitigation: Limit context to selected entries and targeted evidence after local matching

commercialista_notice.message_it: Registri e archivi fatture vengono confrontati localmente. Codex esamina soltanto le scritture selezionate, gli esiti dei controlli e le evidenze mirate necessarie a risolvere le eccezioni.
commercialista_notice.message_en: Journals and invoice archives are compared locally. Codex reviews only selected entries, check results and the targeted evidence needed to resolve exceptions.

limitations: An unresolved check can require a larger supporting passage
This is a design-time data-flow review, not a GDPR legal determination
